subcodes.first_line: O thou who art mentioned in the presence of the Wronged One! We bear witness that thou didst hearken unto the Call and didst turn thyself unto Him, and didst speak that which was uttered [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا ایها المذکور لدی المظلوم نشهد انک سمعت الندآء و اقبلت الیه و نطقت بما نطق
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for nearness to God, @prayer for steadfastness; obedience, @Manifestation of God as tree of life; sadratu'l-muntaha
